title: Better Skin Utils
description: Allow users to upload their own skins directly in the game.
body:
**BSU** - A simple modification that allows you to change your skin using the _/skin_ command.

**Features** - Auto Skin Saving, support for transparent skins, choice of model. _(Slim or Classic)_

**How to use?** - /skin [set/clear] [slim/classic] _(choice skin file)_

**CAUTION!** This is a client-side modification; only you can see the skin.
